title: La sequía
overview: Fran is a famous actress. One night, at a local jet set party, she discovers that her partner and manager, besides abusing her ﬁnancially, cheats on her. Fran escapes from the city to the desert to travel his own “drought”. In that 72 hours trip and, in solitude, she will have to face the question: Which way do I want to take…?
